sentences.text: The visitor who scrolled past your benefits is interested but hesitating.
Source the real objections: from your research — reviews, sales calls, support tickets.
Ask AI: "Given this product and price, list the 7 most likely hesitations, ranked"
Answer honestly and briefly: "Will this work with my setup?"
— one confident line plus proof beats three defensive paragraphs
Deploy risk reversal: free trial, guarantee, "cancel anytime" — placed right at the final CTA where the fear peaks
